name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan introduces significant changes to the methodology, including: 1) A different imputation strategy (adding uncertainty and missing indicators), 2) A change in the target definition (70th percentile vs median), 3) A shift from LOMO to LOCO cross-validation, 4) A change in the modeling approach (multi-task learning and baseline vs full model comparison), and 5) New analysis techniques (Mahalanobis distance, SHAP, ALE plots). Because the data processing, target definition, and modeling framework are fundamentally different, no steps from the old plan can be reused.
